intro: A small ocean in my hands, dyed in vibrant colors! I invite you to a healing drawing world where you can enjoy creating your own sea friends with your imagination.
description:
The 'Crayon' series, beloved by children and creative adults worldwide, now dives into a mysterious underwater world! 'Crayon Sea Friends' is a creativity game where you fill adorable whales, playful turtles, sparkling fish, and other diverse marine creatures with your own colors.

It offers an intuitive interface that anyone can easily enjoy without complicated controls, and it recreates the texture of coloring with real crayons through precise touch controls. Watch your completed sea friends come to life with vivid animation. It will be the most perfect digital sketchbook, offering both educational fun and emotional stability.
